title: Click Out of Containers
description: Lets you click outside the bounds of a container to automatically close it
body: # Click Out of Containers Minecraft has a feature that lets you click outside the bounds of a container to automatically close it while using touch screen. Unfortunately, this feature is locked behind requiring using touch screen, but this mod allows you to bypass that restriction! Please note that this may cause issues with other mods or cause unintended side effects. This mod does have a config that you can use to quickly disable the feature, should issues arise.
